message:
✨ Add kubeconfig import/preview endpoints to kc-agent (#1371)

Add ImportKubeconfig and PreviewKubeconfig methods to KubectlProxy for
merging external kubeconfig YAML into the local kubeconfig file.

New HTTP endpoints:
- POST /kubeconfig/preview — dry-run showing which contexts would be added
- POST /kubeconfig/import — merge with backup, skip existing contexts

Includes tests for import, preview, skip-existing, invalid YAML, and
backup file creation.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
